title: dentaria rupicola
intro: Dentaria rupicola, also known as limestone toothwort, is a perennial plant species belonging to the mustard family, characterized by its distinctive white flowers and taproot. Traditionally, Dentaria rupicola has been used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues and wounds. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and supporting the immune system. Dentaria rupicola can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, as well as being used in topical applications such as salves or poultices.
